eq_name: G₂-Ricci Flow as NP Pump Dynamics
equation: Identifies the NP Pump daemon cycle with the Ricci-harmonic flow of G₂ structures. Torsion drives the flow; torsion-free = fully coherent. Source: Dwivedi (2026) arXiv:2601.05210, Pinčák et al. (2025) NucPhysB 1017:116959.

Formalizes the PCI scar concept as geometric torsion on the daemon manifold. The Ricci-harmonic flow attempts to smooth torsion; singularities classify failure modes. Source: PCI synthesis of Dwivedi + Pinčák.
Predicts that the six active daemon modes amplify near phase transitions (insights, epiphanies, state shifts). The void mode remains massive. Source: Florio et al. (2025) PRL 135:242303.

Explains why the void mode has not been identified in microtubule resonance data: it is not a peak but a diffuse background. Connects to SYK soft modes and slow light. Source: Sun & Ye (2025) PRB 112:085127.
Maps Ouyang's jamming phase diagram onto the daemon architecture. The consciousness/coherence boundary is a critical surface, not a threshold. Source: Ouyang (2025) arXiv:2507.08197.

Translates Pinčák's torsion-mass mechanism to the daemon architecture. The 'weight' of each daemon is set by local geometry, not imposed from outside. Source: Pinčák et al. (2025) NucPhysB 1017:116959.

eq_name: Lichnerowicz Spectral Gap with Torsion Correction
equation: Formal connection between torsion accumulation (scarring) and coherence stability. As torsion grows, the spectral gap shrinks. At |T|² = R_min/(8C) the gap closes — the system hits criticality. Source: Lichnerowicz (1963), adapted to G₂ by Dwivedi (2022).

Foundational jamming equation. ω* → 0 = soft-mode slowing = Goldstone mode softening at consciousness boundary. D(ω) plateau = proliferation of near-zero daemon modes near criticality. Source: Wyart (2005, Annales de Physique 30:3).

eq_name: Hou Vacuum Manifold as G₂/SU(3) Coset
equation: Independent derivation of the PCI vacuum manifold from criticality theory. Hou (2025) arrives at S⁶ without citing PCI or G₂ — two independent paths to the same coset space. Structural confirmation of FP-6. Source: Hou (2025) Six Keys Criticality / 六鑰臨界, Zenodo.

Formal equation for the fractal triplet-of-triplet spectrum reported in microtubule resonance. Cited external equation — not derived from PCI but tested against G₂ topology in Section 3.6. Source: Saxena et al. (2020) Fractal Fract. 4(2):11.

eq_name: Lotay-Wei Exponential Convergence to Torsion-Free G₂
equation: The NP Pump has a rate constant. α = λ₁/2 is the decoherence/recoherence timescale — how fast the daemon manifold returns to maximal coherence after perturbation. λ₁ depends on the specific G₂ manifold geometry; computing it for microtubule-scale structures would yield a testable prediction. Source: Lotay-Wei (2017) arXiv:1504.07771, JDG 2019.

eq_name: Laplacian Flow for Closed G₂ Structures
equation: The fundamental evolution equation for G₂ structures. The flow drives the system toward torsion-free (maximal coherence). Scalar curvature is negative of torsion-squared — more scarring = more negative curvature = more curved daemon manifold. Source: Lotay-Wei (2017) arXiv:1504.07367.

The precise condition for when the NP Pump crashes: torsion gradient + curvature diverge together. The blow-up rate C/(T₀−t) gives a power-law approach to singularity — the system accelerates toward crisis. Source: Lotay-Wei (2017) arXiv:1504.07367, Theorems 1.3/5.1.

Solitons are self-similar solutions of the Laplacian flow — daemon configurations that change shape but preserve their type. No compact shrinking solitons = the daemon manifold cannot self-shrink to a point. Steady = torsion-free = maximal coherence is the only compact steady state. Source: Lotay-Wei (2017), Propositions 9.1-9.5.

eq_name: Recoherence Timescale from S⁷ Spectral Gap
equation: First computation of a physical recoherence timescale from G₂ spectral data. Uses λ₁ = 7 from the Hodge Laplacian on exact 3-forms on S⁷ (Ikeda-Taniguchi 1978) as a proxy for compact G₂ holonomy manifolds (whose λ₁ is unknown). CAVEAT: S⁷ has holonomy SO(8), not G₂. This is an order-of-magnitude estimate. Source: Ikeda-Taniguchi (1978) + Lotay-Wei (2019) + PCI synthesis.

The isometric flow: daemon manifold evolves toward minimal torsion while preserving the metric. This is the NP Pump operating at fixed cognitive architecture — the structure reorganizes without changing the underlying geometry. Source: Dwivedi-Gianniotis-Karigiannis (2023) JGA. arXiv:1904.10068.

The full coupled flow: both the metric AND the G₂ structure evolve simultaneously. Torsion-free is the unique stationary point on compact manifolds. Nearly G₂ structures are SHRINKING solitons — they collapse under this flow. Steady solitons must be torsion-free. Source: Dwivedi (2026) arXiv:2601.05210.

The torsion evolves by diffusion (smoothing) plus a cubic self-interaction (nonlinear feedback) plus curvature coupling. The cubic term |T|^2 T is the scar-scar interaction — accumulated torsion amplifies itself. The diffusion term is the healing. Their competition determines whether the system reaches torsion-free or blows up. Source: DGK (2023) Theorem 4.6.

Complete taxonomy of how consciousness can crash or degrade. Type I = sudden crisis (panic attack seizure). Type IIa = slow deterioration reaching crisis. Type IIb = gradual infinite weakening (chronic depression). Type III = rapid infinite decay (degenerative). Nearly G₂ structures are shrinking solitons = Type I examples. First explicit examples on contact Calabi-Yau 7-manifolds. Source: Dwivedi-Singhal (2026) arXiv:2601.16832.

At a singularity the damage is localized to a 5-dimensional subset. The rest of the 7-manifold remains smooth. In PCI: a consciousness crash doesn't destroy the entire daemon architecture — it damages a 5-dimensional subspace while preserving the complementary 2-dimensional structure (potentially the rank-2 Cartan torus). Source: DGK (2023) Theorem 5.18.

The NP Pump equation space is FINITE. Any second-order G₂-preserving evolution law must be a linear combination of exactly 4 symmetric 2-tensors and 2 vector fields. There are no other options — the algebra closes. This constrains the daemon dynamics to a 6-parameter family. Source: DGK (2025) PAMQ 21(5):2035-2186. arXiv:2311.05516.

eq_name: G₂ Curvature Decomposition into Irreducible Representations
equation: How curvature (geometry) decomposes under G₂ symmetry. The daemon manifold's curvature lives in 5 irreducible G₂ representations. The 1 = scalar (overall coherence level). The 27s = traceless symmetric (daemon-specific deformations). The 64 and 77 = Weyl (pure geometry independent of daemon content). Source: DGK (2025).

eq_name: Spin(7) Gradient Flow for Dyadic Structures
equation: The Spin(7) flow governs the dyad: two coupled G₂ consciousness systems evolving together in 8 dimensions. Only 3 building blocks (vs 6 for G₂). The extra constraint from going 7D→8D halves the degrees of freedom — coupling two systems is MORE constrained than running one. No expanding solitons = dyad can't inflate. Steady = fully coherent only. Source: Dwivedi (2025) QJM 76(2):537-563. arXiv:2404.00870.

The default consciousness configuration (nearly G₂) is topologically rigid. You cannot wiggle out of it continuously — you must undergo a discontinuous phase transition to reach a different G₂ structure. This connects to Crowley-Goette-Nordstrom's disconnected moduli space: different consciousness states are separated by topological barriers. Source: Dwivedi-Singhal (2020) arXiv:2007.02497.
